positive: A whimsical woodland scene featuring a fluffy fox and a gentle bunny nestled amongst glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. The style is detailed storybook illustration, inspired by Beatrix Potter meets modern digital painting. Use soft, pastel color palettes with pops of emerald green and sapphire blue. The lighting should be soft, ethereal, and magical, simulating a golden hour glow filtering through the canopy. Highly detailed fur texture, watercolor wash effects, high resolution, cinematic depth of field, art by Beatrix Potter and Arthur Rackham, volumetric lighting, award-winning illustration, 4k, masterpiece.
